# Project6_PMS (Prism) — Detailed AI Context (v1.1.0)

This document provides deep context for AI agents working on Project6_PMS.

## 🚨 Primary Constraints

- **Language Policy**: **Korean** for conversation, **English** for code/comments/docs.
- **Development**: Coding on macOS (JayLight-MacPro), Running on Windows.
- **Modification**: **Minimal Diff**. Do not rewrite whole files.
- **Database**: Use `better-sqlite3`. No `async/await` for database operations unless needed for wrapping logic.
- **Git Flow**: All commits must be immediately followed by a `git push`.
- **Efficiency**: No openers ("Sure!"), closures ("Hope this helps!"), or sycophancy.

## 📂 Project Decomposition

### Mother HQ (`/mother`)
| Feature | Entry Point | Route/Line |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| Main Dashboard | `mother/src/App.tsx` | `App` Component (L25) |
| Vessel Management| `mother/src/App.tsx` | `handleSelectVessel` (L60) |
| Fleet Registry | `mother/server.js` | `GET /api/fleet` (L315) |
| Global PMS | `mother/server.js` | `GET /api/pms/items` (L293) |
| SMS Templates | `mother/server.js` | `GET /api/sms/templates` (L152) |
| Form Styling | `mother/template_sync.js` | Update .docx/.xlsx styling |
| Doc Filling | `shared/doc_generator.js` | AI-assisted font shrinking |
| Audit Logs | `mother/server.js` | `GET /api/logs/global` (L457) |

### Child Vessel (`/child`)
| Feature | Entry Point | Purpose |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| Vessel Dashboard| `child/src/App.tsx`| Main operator UI |
| Sync Client | `child/src/sync.js` | Sync with Mother HQ |

### Shared Resources (`/shared`)
- **Schema**: `shared/schema.sql` (Canonical table structures).
- **Utility**: `shared/sync_util.js` (Sync protocol, conflict resolution).

## 📊 Database Schema Summary

Key Tables:
- `fleet`: (id, imo, name, status)
- `pms_categories`: (id, parent_id, name, type) – Hierarchical tree.
- `sms_templates`: (id, category_id, name, content)

## 🎨 UI Style System

- **Glassmorphism**: Defined in `shared/styles/global.css`.
- **Icons**: Always use `lucide-react`.
- **Tokens**: HSL-based (e.g., `hsl(199, 94%, 60%)`).

## ⚙️ Standardized Harness Documentation
All AI agents **must** maintain these files in `docs_canonical/`:
1. `AGENT_QUICKREF.md`: Route/Function fast lookup.
2. `REPO_MAP.md`: Path/Line registry.
3. `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `STYLEGUIDE.md`, `WORKFLOWS.md`.
